title: carlina sicula
intro: Carlina sicula, also known as the Italian Carline Thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carlina sicula include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and digestive health. Carlina sicula can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
